class.name: SpineSliderData
class.brief_description: Stores the setup pose for a Slider.
class.description: Stores the setup pose data for a slider constraint, including the animation it references, whether it's additive, looping settings, and scale/offset values.

method.name: get_animation
method.description: Returns the animation referenced by this slider.

method.name: get_additive
method.description: Returns whether this slider uses additive blending.

method.name: set_additive
method.description: Sets whether this slider uses additive blending.

method.name: get_bone
method.description: Returns the bone data for this slider.

method.name: set_bone
method.description: Sets the bone data for this slider.

method.name: get_scale
method.description: Returns the scale value for this slider.

method.name: set_scale
method.description: Sets the scale value for this slider.

method.name: get_offset
method.description: Returns the offset value for this slider.

method.name: set_offset
method.description: Sets the offset value for this slider.

method.name: get_setup_pose
method.description: Returns the setup pose for this slider data.
